Coal - % electricity.titleShort: Share of electricity generated by coal
Coal - % electricity.titleLong: Share of electricity generated by coal
Coal - % electricity.descriptionShort: Measured as a percentage of total electricity produced in the country or region.
Coal - % electricity.descriptionProcessing: - Electricity data from 2000 onwards (and from 1990 onwards for European countries, including Turkey) comes from Ember. Earlier data comes from the Energy Institute.
Coal - % electricity.citationShort: Ember (2026); Energy Institute - Statistical Review of World Energy (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
